title: Synchrony and Rooms To Go Renew Consumer Financing Partnership To Create Omnichannel, Personalized Shopping Experience
text: 21-year Partnership Results In Premier Repeat Sales Growth for Rooms To Go Companies To Expand Digital Account Management Capabilities and Offer Special Promotional Financing SEFFNER, Fla. and STAMFORD, Conn.

title: Synchrony Core Purchase Volumes Grow 11% as Charge-offs Also Increase
text: For Synchrony Financial, consumer spending volumes remain robust, receivables increased — and loans past due are on the rise. As the largest provider of private label cards, Synchrony's results offer a snapshot of how card spending growth among prime and non-prime consumers has been faring and how they've been paying down those obligations.

title: Synchrony Financial (SYF) Q4 Earnings Beat on Loan Growth
text: Synchrony Financial's (SYF) Q4 results reflect improved net interest income and an expanding loan receivables portfolio, partly offset by an elevated expense base.

title: Synchrony Financial (SYF) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call January 23, 2022 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Kathryn Miller - SVP, IR Brian Doubles - President, CEO & Director Brian Wenzel - EVP & CFO Conference Call Participants Moshe Orenbuch - Credit Suisse Ryan Nash - Goldman Sachs Donald Fandetti - Wells Fargo Sanjay Sakhrani - KBW Erika Najarian - UBS Arren Cyganovich - Citigroup Betsy Graseck - Morgan Stanley Kevin Barker - Piper Sandler John Hecht - Jefferies Richard Shane - JPMorgan Operator Good morning, and welcome to the Synchrony Financial Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. Please refer to the company's Investor Relations website for access to their earnings materials.

title: Synchrony (SYF) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Synchrony (SYF) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 12.50% and 1.68%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Synchrony Reports Fourth Quarter 2022 Results
text: STAMFORD, Conn. , Jan. 23, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synchrony Financial (NYSE: SYF) today announced its fourth quarter 2022 results for the period ending December 31, 2022.

title: Making Sense of the Early Q4 Results: Is An Earnings Cliff Coming?
text: By the end of this week, we will have seen quarterly results from about 28% of all S&P 500 members and will have a very good sense of whether the earnings-cliff narrative has started unfolding or been further pushed out.

title: Synchrony (SYF) to Post Q4 Earnings: What You Should Know
text: Synchrony's (SYF) fourth-quarter results are likely to reflect higher information processing expenses and lower net interest margins.

title: Synchrony Financial: Growth And Fundamental Stability Remains In Harmony
text: Synchrony Financial maintains a robust performance, balancing revenue growth and viability. Its fundamental stability is visible in its stellar Balance Sheet.

title: Bassett Furniture and Synchrony Partner on Multi-Year Financing Program
text: Program Will Launch as Part of Synchrony's HOME Network™ STAMFORD, Conn. , Jan. 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synchrony (NYSE: SYF), a leading consumer financing company, today announced that they are reestablishing a partnership with Bassett Furniture Industries, Inc. (NASDAQ: BSET) to launch a multi-year financing program.
